chapter_title: Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
text:
A provision of this subtitle applicable to a bicycle also applies to:

(1) a moped, other than a provision that by its nature cannot apply to a moped; and

(2) an electric bicycle, other than a provision that by its nature cannot apply to an electric bicycle.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 551. Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
##### § 551.002 — Moped and Electric Bicycle Included

A provision of this subtitle applicable to a bicycle also applies to:

    (1) a moped, other than a provision that by its nature cannot apply to a moped; and

    (2) an electric bicycle, other than a provision that by its nature cannot apply to an electric bicycle.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 2001, 77th Leg., ch. 1085, Sec. 9, eff. Sept. 1, 2001.*

subsections.text: A provision of this subtitle applicable to a bicycle also applies to:
a moped, other than a provision that by its nature cannot apply to a moped; and
an electric bicycle, other than a provision that by its nature cannot apply to an electric bicycle.
